creator: bdrewery@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Yasuhiro KIMURA from comment #2)
> Created attachment 190076 [details]
> updated patch file
> 
> (In reply to Bryan Drewery from comment #1)
> 
> OK, I updated patch so dependency on dialog4ports is optional. 
> 
> And while I am here installation of bundled rm command is removed because no
> supported FreeBSD version requires it any more.

Did you read the comment? Please don't remove it.

You'll need to rebase your patch now since I won't commit your 'rm' removal and I need to update poudriere-devel.
